lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: I saw you help that merchant with their cart. You're kinder than you admit.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: I helped because his cart blocked my path. Don't romanticize basic logistics, Alon.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. But you helped anyway. That counts for something, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: It counts for a cleared road. Nothing more. Though... the tea's good here.
